title: Allow defining input ports as "input logic" in SystemVerilog
body:
Hi Clifford,

A lot of SV code uses the following syntax in the module port definition list:

   input logic signal1,
   etc.

I removed the check that makes read_verilog fail when it encounters this for SV. Do you think this has any negative implications? I have not completely been able to grasp how you treat wire and reg differently in yosys, and what implications this will have for "logic".

Cheers,
Ruben
